title: Anomaly Event
description: Contract for the anomaly-events Kafka topic. Produced by Flink Anomaly Scorer / Bridge anomaly detector.

event_id.description: Unique identifier for this anomaly event (UUID).

@timestamp.description: Primary timestamp (ISO-8601). Same value as detected_at.

anomaly_type.description: Classification of the anomaly (e.g. error_spike, fatal_error, timeout).

severity.description: Anomaly severity (lowercase). Distinct from log level.

detected_at.description: When the anomaly was detected. Same value as @timestamp.

trace_id.description: Trace ID of the triggering log, if applicable.

affected_services.description: All services involved in this anomaly.

affected_endpoint.description: API endpoint where the anomaly was observed.

causal_chain.description: Ordered list of events leading to the anomaly.

evidence_logs.description: Sample log entries that evidence the anomaly.

z_score.description: Statistical z-score for windowed anomaly detection.

error_rate.description: Error rate in the detection window.

status.description: Lifecycle status of the anomaly event.

error_message.description: Representative error message from the triggering log.

error_category.description: Classified error category (e.g. database, network, auth).
